name: Sportsbook API Odds Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for Sportsbook API odds, arbitrage, and betting analysis data

structures.name: OddsResponse
structures.description: Root response containing event odds from multiple sportsbooks for a sport and league

fields.name: sport
fields.description: Sport name: football | basketball | baseball | hockey | soccer

fields.name: league
fields.description: League abbreviation (NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, NCAAF, NCAAB, EPL, MLS)

fields.name: events
fields.description: List of events with odds for the specified sport/league

structures.name: EventOdds
structures.description: A single event with all available odds across sportsbooks

fields.name: markets
fields.description: Available betting markets with odds from each sportsbook

structures.name: MarketOdds
structures.description: Odds for a specific betting market type from all sportsbooks

fields.name: market
fields.description: Market type: spread | moneyline | total | prop | future

fields.name: period
fields.description: Game period: fullgame | firsthalf | firstquarter | etc.

fields.name: bookmakers
fields.description: Odds from each sportsbook for this market

fields.name: homeOdds
fields.description: Home team or over odds in American format

fields.name: awayOdds
fields.description: Away team or under odds in American format

structures.name: ArbitrageOpportunity
structures.description: A guaranteed profit betting opportunity across two sportsbooks

structures.name: PositiveEvBet
structures.description: A bet with positive expected value vs. sharp consensus or no-vig fair odds

fields.name: team
fields.description: Team or side to bet on
